creator: clefevre-lists@noos.fr
text:
bischoff@rickjr.org writes:

[snip, see http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=27619 for details]

until http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=26976 is commited,
try changing the following two variables in the Makefile (untested) :

STDDIR= linux/${PORTVERSION}/en/os/${MACHINE_ARCH}/RedHat/RPMS
UPDDIR= linux/updates/${PORTVERSION}/en/os/${MACHINE_ARCH}

Cyrille.
--
home: mailto:clefevre@redirect.to   UNIX is user-friendly; it's just particular
work: mailto:Cyrille.Lefevre@edf.fr   about who it chooses to be friends with.
